untranslatable_reason: The Adam & Adam double bottom pattern requires detection of two distinct minor lows separated by 3-6 weeks with specific valley identification and confirmation line crossing. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition (valley detection, relative low comparison, and time-based separation measurement) that cannot be expressed using single-bar indicator comparisons. The confirmation criteria is incomplete in the source text ('confirmation requirement incomplete in excerpt'). Pattern detection logic would need custom bar sequence analysis beyond the allowed single-condition operators.
translation_notes: Signal references a chart pattern requiring: (1) identification of two separate valleys/lows, (2) measurement of time separation (3-6 weeks), (3) confirmation line breakout, and (4) throwback analysis. These are structural price pattern elements that require lookback window analysis and relative extrema detection. The allowed indicator set and single-condition operators cannot capture the multi-bar pattern logic needed. A placeholder entry condition (price rise) and exit condition (break below SMA) are provided as approximations, but the full pattern logic is untranslatable with current constraints. Success rate: 78% bull market (incomplete bear data). Average rise: 40%.
